steps.name: resource-inventory
steps.last_known_state: All required Stage 1 resources in resource_manifest.json are final. Unity MCP imported and found all sprite Texture2D assets under Assets/Sprites.
steps.next_action: Resource inventory is complete. Next Harness work should move to Unity validation/tooling or the next approved game unit.

decision_log.decision: Resource inventory completed after all room, audio, item, monster, and UI resources were marked final.

steps.resume_prompt: Resource inventory is complete. Continue with Unity validation/tooling or the next approved Harness unit.

steps.name: item-torn-drawing-fragment-resource
steps.last_known_state: Final 256x256 PNG generated and copied to EscapeFromNightmares/Assets/Sprites/Items/item_torn_drawing_fragment.png. resource_manifest.json marks only this item icon as final.
steps.next_action: User reviews item_torn_drawing_fragment.png and approves or requests revision before the next resource unit starts.

decision_log.decision: User instructed Codex to proceed with the next Harness-recorded task; treated as implementation approval for this resource unit.
User instructed Codex to proceed according to the Harness; treated as review approval and completion for this ready_for_review unit.

validation_reports: Manual PNG validation: 256x256, non-zero byte, loadable via System.Drawing.
steps.resume_prompt: Review EscapeFromNightmares/Assets/Sprites/Items/item_torn_drawing_fragment.png. If accepted, approve this step, then create or open the next item icon resource unit for item_study_safe_clue.png.

steps.name: stage1-audio-selection-manifest
steps.last_known_state: Mapped all 62 required Stage 1 audio slots to source WAV files from EscapeFromNightmares/Assets/Audio/Gamemaster Audio - Pro Sound Collection. No target placeholder audio files were replaced.
steps.next_action: User reviews audio_selection_manifest.json and approves either OGG conversion/replacement or WAV target-format update as a separate Harness unit.

decision_log.decision: User approved implementation with approved_for_implementation: stage1_audio_selection_manifest.
Created an audio selection manifest only; did not copy, convert, delete, move, or replace audio files.
User instructed Codex to proceed according to the Harness; treated as review approval and completion for this ready_for_review unit.

steps.resume_prompt: Review audio_selection_manifest.json. If accepted, approve a new unit for converting selected WAV files to the required OGG target filenames or for changing the design targets to WAV.

steps.name: stage1-audio-wav-target-update
steps.last_known_state: Converted 62 Stage 1 audio targets from OGG placeholders to WAV target assets. Copied selected WAV files into Unity target folders and deleted obsolete target OGG placeholders plus OGG meta files.
steps.next_action: User reviews the WAV target update, then approves the next single resource unit or Unity validation tooling unit.

decision_log.decision: User chose WAV target update instead of OGG conversion.
User chose deletion of obsolete OGG placeholder files and OGG meta files.
Copied selected WAV source files to Stage 1 target audio folders and updated manifests/resource list to WAV.
User instructed Codex to proceed according to the Harness; treated as review approval and completion for this ready_for_review unit.

steps.resume_prompt: Step 3 has been approved and completed. Continue with the next single resource unit in design_review.

steps.name: remaining-visual-resources-batch
steps.last_known_state: Generated remaining 7 monster images and 23 UI images. All resource_manifest.json entries are final. Unity MCP imported and found generated sprite assets.
steps.next_action: Resource inventory is complete. Next Harness work should move to Unity validation/tooling or the next approved game unit.

decision_log.decision: User approved all remaining approval-gated resource work and requested no separate approvals.
Approved exception to combine remaining monster and UI resource files into one batch resource unit to finish the resource inventory.
Unity MCP is active at EscapeFromNightmares@c6f9dc4f and should be used for Unity-side asset checks after file generation.
Generated 7 monster images with the built-in image generation path.
Generated 23 UI images locally as hand-drawn grayscale UI sprites.
Unity MCP imported Assets/Sprites/Monster and Assets/Sprites/UI and found the expected generated Texture2D assets.

steps.resume_prompt: Step 13 is complete. All resources are final. Continue with Unity validation/tooling or the next approved Harness unit.
